successCriteria.description: src/modules/leave-type/leave-type.model.ts exists and exports LeaveType and CreateLeaveTypeDto
src/modules/leave-type/leave-type.repository.ts exists and exports ILeaveTypeRepository and LeaveTypeRepository
src/modules/policy/policy.repository.ts exists and exports ILeavePolicyRepository and LeavePolicyRepository
LeaveTypeRepository implements ILeaveTypeRepository using the pg Pool from src/shared/db/connection
LeavePolicyRepository implements ILeavePolicyRepository using the pg Pool from src/shared/db/connection
LeaveTypeRepository.findById queries the leave_types table by id and returns a LeaveType or null
LeaveTypeRepository.findAll queries all leave_types and returns an array of LeaveType
LeavePolicyRepository.findByLeaveTypeId queries the leave_policies table by leave_type_id and returns a LeavePolicy or null

constraints: Repository pattern: All database access goes through repository interfaces.
No dependencies on other modules (leave, employee, balance, notification).
Use the pg Pool from src/shared/db/connection.
outOfScope: Phase 2 — Employee domain model and repository
Phase 3 — LeaveRequest domain model and repository
Phase 4 — LeaveBalance domain model and repository
Phase 5 — Notification and AuditLog domain models and repositories
Phase 6 — Scaffold leave-management module and service interface
Phase 8 — approve and reject use cases
Phase 9 — cancel leave, discard draft, balance recalculation
Phase 10 — audit logging, RBAC enforcement, read operations
